title: begonia harlingii
intro: Begonia harlingii, a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, is a rare, endemic plant found in the Andes mountain range of Ecuador. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems are believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and can be consumed as a tea or used in herbal preparations. Herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, are made from the plant's leaves and stems to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
